description_long: This is a compact, tan-colored armored combat vehicle with a sloped front hull and a prominent central cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features two large, rugged wheels on each side, partially covered by angular fenders, and has visible hatches and periscopes on the turret for crew access and visibility. The front hull displays a bold white arrow and a black chevron marking, while the turret sides are adorned with a white club symbol. Additional equipment, such as storage boxes, cylindrical canisters, and spare parts, are mounted on the sides and rear. The surface appears weathered and dusty, suggesting use in arid environments. The vehicle's design emphasizes protection and firepower, with thick, sloped armor and multiple weapon mounts.
description: A tan, armored combat vehicle with a central cannon, sloped armor, and rugged wheels, featuring military markings and external equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, central cannon, two rectangular vision ports, and a bold white arrow with a black chevron marking.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the turret-mounted cannon, white club symbol, two large wheels, and external storage boxes and canisters.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back armor, rear hatch, and additional equipment mounted on the rear fenders.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the cannon, cylindrical canister, spare parts, and the rugged wheel design.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front, and a secondary machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; reinforced turret and hull with visible angular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan paint with weathered, dusty appearance; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White arrow and black chevron on the front hull; white club symbol on the turret sides; red equipment on the left side.
attribute_tire_type: Two large, rugged wheels per side with deep tread pattern for off-road use; no visible reinforcement or chains.
